root_cause_hypothesis: Recent-vintage risk mix or macro deterioration
specific_investigation: Decompose by grade, purpose, FICO and DTI; compare prior cohort
quantified_remediation: Reduce Red-segment origination exposure by an approved quantified cap
decision_required: Approve targeted policy review or accept residual risk
acceptance_criteria: Bad rate <=18% for two eligible periods
closure_evidence: Segment analysis, policy approval and two-period monitoring evidence
dependency: P3 score and P6 policy fields

root_cause_hypothesis: Synthetic transition assumptions produce elevated late-stage stock
specific_investigation: Review transition matrix, term mix and balance bridge
quantified_remediation: Validate scenario severity, transition assumptions and representativeness; retain the Red outcome when it is an intentional stress scenario
decision_required: Accept the documented controls-test scenario or revise unsupported transition assumptions
acceptance_criteria: Bridge difference 0, documented scenario rationale and no outcome-driven tuning
closure_evidence: Transition tests, stock-flow reconciliation and scenario-governance note
dependency: Synthetic engine only; observed DPD required for production

root_cause_hypothesis: Score distribution shift versus P3 development baseline
specific_investigation: Review fixed-bin PSI by score, FICO, DTI, loan amount and missingness
quantified_remediation: Perform Amber diagnostic review and heightened monthly monitoring; formal model review only if PSI >0.25
decision_required: Model Risk decides whether drivers justify monitoring exception, challenger analysis or recalibration study
acceptance_criteria: PSI <0.10 for two consecutive eligible periods or approved monitoring exception with owner, driver, residual risk and expiry
closure_evidence: Feature PSI drilldown, root-cause note and Model Risk monitoring decision

root_cause_hypothesis: High DTI/low FICO routing and data exceptions
specific_investigation: Profile exception reason, owner, exposure and outcome maturity
quantified_remediation: Reduce avoidable exceptions to <=2% or document capacity plan
closure_evidence: Exception log, owner sign-off and closure sample

root_cause_hypothesis: Broad watchlist proxy rather than observed relative SICR
specific_investigation: Decompose trigger attribution, term and purpose concentration
quantified_remediation: Acquire current PD/DPD and replace broad proxy
acceptance_criteria: Observed SICR coverage established; proxy share no longer primary
closure_evidence: Data contract, trigger attribution and implementation evidence

specific_investigation: Review downside bridge, EAD sensitivity and top concentration
quantified_remediation: Set downside buffer/action tied to quantified uplift
decision_required: Finance Risk approves buffer or risk acceptance
closure_evidence: Scenario bridge, concentration action and committee decision

root_cause_hypothesis: Critical queue priority does not align with fraud yield
specific_investigation: Review rule overlap, reason codes and non-fraud alerts
quantified_remediation: Redesign priority routing to precision >=2% minimum
